steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The notes state: “In ballroom dance, there is a position called closed facing position.” This single sentence provides the specific example the student needs to illustrate.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A directly repeats that idea: “Closed facing position is an example of a position in ballroom dance.” It uses the exact example from the notes.
The other three choices either omit the closed‑facing position or talk about positions in general, so they do not give the requested example.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
